The '''S-FRG''' was a model of aquatic [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] employed by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. It was the backbone of the Trade Federation's aquatic fleets, used for assault, defense, and escort duty. The Trade Federation used them extensively during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

{{Veh-stub}}
